title: payena lucida var. wightii
intro: Payena lucida var. wightii is a plant species, also known as the Wight's Payena or Payena wightii, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Its health benefits include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Payena lucida var. wightii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its roots are also used in traditional medicine to create poultices or topical creams.
